dialogos.texto_en: Tah-dah!\nToday, we're shopping in American Village!
Whaaaa?!\nWhy is America in Okinawa?
This is a shopping mall\nthat's designed like America.
I can understand why you're surprised, Raiha-chan.\nThe cityscape doesn't look like Japan at all.
I heard that this entire area was designed\nto resemble the west coast of the United States.
It's pretty big.\nIt seems like there are a lot of interesting shops too.
Hehehe, for you, Nino, I've got this!\nUse this shop list.
Oh, how thoughtful of you.
Teehee.
(Same old Yotsuba...\n No, something's a little different.)
(I shouldn't judge people\n based on their speech or actions anymore.\n That would just be my own self-centeredness.)
Futaro-kun, you're surprisingly quiet today.
Did something Dad say to you yesterday\nget to you?
Yeah, that was honestly pretty tough.\nI really need to step up and be more responsible.
Teehee, I see.\nSo you've grown on this trip too, huh?
Alright, where should we start?
Knowing you guys,\nyou probably all want to go different places, right?
So, shall we just do our own thing?
Hm... I got it!
What's up?
I want to go somewhere with Uesugi-san.\nIs that okay?
Huh?
Just the two of you?
Of course, just the two of us.
You don't have to worry about us.\nYou can go wherever you want.
Yes, if you want to do that, Yotsuba,\nwe have no objections.
That's right. Take your time and have fun, okay?
Have a good time!
And what about you, Uesugi-san?
Why are you asking me?\nThere's no way I'd refuse.
...Okay!
(Led by Yotsuba, we started walking\n and ended up in a labyrinth-like area.)
(It seems like this shopping mall\n is actually a combination of multiple buildings.)
(In the midst of it all,\n Yotsuba seemed to be wandering down random paths,\n yet%p-2;――%p;)
Yotsuba? Where are we now?\nI don't even know which direction we're facing anymore.
Tee-hee-hee.\nNow, I wonder?
Hey, don't tell me you're lost or something.
But it's fun to get lost here.\nIt never gets boring to look at it all.\nIt feels like a theme park!
We're actually lost, right?
Don't worry.\nIt's not a real maze, so even if you get a little lost,\nyou'll eventually find your way out.
Wait a minute.\nDoesn't that mean we're actually lost?
Ahahaha!\nYou worry too much, Uesugi-san.
Jeez...
Sometimes, it's nice to just walk around\nwithout a care in the world, like this.
It's a little unsettling not knowing where it leads,\nbut that's what makes it exciting, right?
For sure.\nIt IS like a theme park.
All the shops look so interesting,\nit's hard not to stop by each and every one.
Also, there are so many decorations\nthat just looking at them gets you excited!
Yeah, this isn't half bad.\nLet's keep going further ahead.
Yeah, let's go!
Sometimes, it's nice to just walk around\nwithout a care in the world, like this.
It's a little unsettling not knowing where it leads,\nbut that's what makes it exciting, right?
It's alright to get lost.\nI don't mind either way.
Huh?
I mean, as long as I'm with you,\nI don't mind getting lost...\nis what I mean.
Ah...
With you,\nI feel like I can walk down any path I want.
...Okay.
C-come on, here we go!
Yeah! Let's keep on keepin' on!
Sometimes, it's nice to just walk around\nwithout a care in the world, like this.
It's a little unsettling not knowing where it leads,\nbut that's what makes it exciting, right?
I feel like I finally understand something\nyou said a long time ago.
Huh? What are you talking about?
(If you're with someone you like,\n just walking around is enjoyable.\n I guess that's what a date is like.)
So, where are we heading?
That's a surprise for when we get there!\nCome on, this way!
